_meta.title: Alessandro's Health — Formulated with restraint, for everyday care.
_meta.description: Alessandro's Health — An everyday care system from Hong Kong, covering skin comfort, nasal comfort, body recovery, and aging-aware lifestyle support.
_meta.ogDescription: Formulated with restraint, for everyday care. Hong Kong.

hero.title:
Formulated with restraint,
for everyday care.
hero.subtitle: An everyday care system from Hong Kong, covering skin comfort, nasal comfort, body recovery, and aging-aware lifestyle support.

standard.title: A quieter standard for everyday care.
standard.lead: Alessandro's Health is built for practical everyday routines, lower burden of use, and responsible communication. We focus on products and protocols that sit quietly inside daily life — without excessive claims, noise, or complexity.
standard.p1_desc: Everyday forms should be easy to understand, repeat, and live with. A product that adds complexity to your routine has already failed, regardless of its formulation.
standard.p2_desc: Communication stays precise, careful, and proportionate to what is known. We make no exaggerated health claims or promises. What we say reflects what we know.
standard.p3_desc: Portfolio decisions are guided by credibility, restraint, and consistency. We would rather have fewer products that earn genuine trust than many that earn attention.

focus.title: Four everyday care domains.
focus.lead: Each domain addresses a specific set of everyday body signals — designed for low burden, repeatability, and quiet effectiveness.
focus.skin_desc: An everyday care concept for sensitive, dry, itchy, or easily irritated skin. Low-irritation formulations designed for repeated use without added burden.
focus.nasal_desc: A low-burden nasal care concept for seasonal and environmental sensitivity. Gentle formats for everyday or as-needed use.
focus.body_desc: Formats designed for fatigue, stiffness, and everyday physical discomfort. Fast-acting, refreshing feel, non-sticky.
focus.tea_desc: A tea-based everyday drink concept developed for lightness, habit, and modern living. Organic, decaffeinated, with a lingering finish.

signals.title: Nine early body signals.
signals.lead: AH identifies nine early body signals as starting points for personalised, low-burden intervention. These are not diagnoses — they are invitations to notice.

brand_statement:
Not about creating more choices,
but filtering what is truly worth keeping.

products.title:
A controlled portfolio,
not a noisy catalogue.
products.lead: Every product in the AH system exists because it addresses a concrete, observable need — not because a market gap was found. Progress follows evidence and feedback, not timelines.
products.t6_name: Professor Sinn Deep Soothing Balm EX
products.card1_desc: A fresh herbal formulation for everyday aches and discomfort. Fast-acting, refreshing feel, non-sticky. Designed for moments when something hurts and you want immediate relief.
products.card2_desc: Low-irritation, low-burden everyday skin dialogue. For sensitive, dry, or easily reddened skin. Formula No.02 — private quota. A product designed to sit quietly in your morning routine.
products.card3_desc: Organic tea leaves, decaffeinated, with a lingering finish. A daily ritual tea for those who prefer lightness without caffeine. Not a health drink — a better everyday choice.
products.card3_signal_value: Constipation · Elevated blood sugar · Light taste
products.note: Prescription and medical-grade products are handled separately through appropriate professional and regulatory channels. Progress follows evidence and feedback, not timelines.

science.title:
Modern aging science,
as a language of understanding.
science.lead: Aging is not merely the passage of time — it is the accumulation of long-term changes across multiple body systems. AH uses modern aging science as a framework for understanding everyday physical states, not as a source for medical claims.
science.source: Sources: López-Otín et al., Cell 186:243-278, 2023 · Kroemer et al., Geromedicine, 2025

culture.text1:
Someone quietly puts on those glasses and gloves.
Because he knows this bottle will ultimately end up in the hands of someone he loves.
He has seen her hands, remembers her face,
knows she dislikes sharp scents and sticky textures.

The truly good things in this world
are often made for those we love most.
culture.text2:
Beauty is not enough. It must work.
Alessandro's Standard evaluates each product across six dimensions:
culture.text3:
True aesthetics are not about instant impression — they allow one to quietly settle into appreciation and enjoyment.

Taste is not decoration. Taste is knowing what is worth keeping and what should be excluded; what only looks good on the surface and what can be used long-term; what attracts in the moment and what leaves texture and utility in everyday life.

Taste is not decoration. Taste is disciplined curation.
culture.f1: I built Alessandro's Health because I was tired of noise.
culture.f2: Tired of products that promise everything and deliver confusion. Tired of ingredient lists designed to impress rather than serve. Tired of "wellness" brands that make you feel like you need fifteen things to feel normal.
culture.f3: I wanted something simpler. A spray that works when my skin is uncomfortable. A tea I can drink every day without thinking about it. A set of products that respects my time and judgment.
culture.f4: This is not about luxury. This is about clarity.
culture.f5: Every product in this system exists because I use it myself — and because I would not hand something to someone I care about unless I fully trust it.
culture.footnote: These are not three product lines. They are the same Alessandro's Standard practised across different life domains.

philosophy:
The goal of Alessandro's Health is not to create more choices.
But to elevate what everyday care can feel like:
simple, calm, practical, trustworthy.

footer.tagline: Formulated with restraint, for everyday care.
footer.motto: Every detail deserves to be treated with care.
